rv_cc_12: Realized vol: trailing std of 1-bar log returns, 12-bar window.
rv_cc_48: Realized vol: trailing std of 1-bar log returns, 48-bar window.
rv_cc_288: Realized vol: trailing std of 1-bar log returns, 288-bar window.
rv_gk_12: Garman-Klass realized vol, 12-bar trailing mean of per-bar GK variance, sqrt.
rv_gk_48: Garman-Klass realized vol, 48-bar trailing mean of per-bar GK variance, sqrt.
rv_gk_288: Garman-Klass realized vol, 288-bar trailing mean of per-bar GK variance, sqrt.
vov_48: Vol-of-vol: 48-bar std of rv_cc_12 divided by its 48-bar mean (coefficient of variation).
rv48_prank_30d: Percentile rank of rv_cc_48 within trailing 30 days (min 5d warmup).
range_prank_30d: Percentile rank of relative bar range (high-low)/close within trailing 30 days.
ret_1: Log return over past 1 bars (5 min).
retn_1: ret_1 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(1) (trailing-vol units).
ret_3: Log return over past 3 bars (15 min).
retn_3: ret_3 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(3) (trailing-vol units).
ret_6: Log return over past 6 bars (30 min).
retn_6: ret_6 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(6) (trailing-vol units).
ret_12: Log return over past 12 bars (60 min).
retn_12: ret_12 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(12) (trailing-vol units).
ret_24: Log return over past 24 bars (120 min).
retn_24: ret_24 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(24) (trailing-vol units).
ret_48: Log return over past 48 bars (240 min).
retn_48: ret_48 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(48) (trailing-vol units).
ret_96: Log return over past 96 bars (480 min).
retn_96: ret_96 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(96) (trailing-vol units).
ret_288: Log return over past 288 bars (1440 min).
retn_288: ret_288 normalized by rv_cc_48 * sqrt(288) (trailing-vol units).
er_12: Kaufman efficiency ratio |net move|/sum|moves| over 12 bars (0=chop, 1=trend).
er_48: Kaufman efficiency ratio |net move|/sum|moves| over 48 bars (0=chop, 1=trend).
er_288: Kaufman efficiency ratio |net move|/sum|moves| over 288 bars (0=chop, 1=trend).
adx_14: Wilder ADX(14) on 5m bars, scaled to [0,1]: trend strength regardless of direction.
dmi_14: Signed directional index (+DI - -DI)/(+DI + -DI), Wilder 14: trend direction in [-1,1].
sma_z_12: Distance of close from 12-bar SMA in units of 12-bar close std (trailing).
sma_z_48: Distance of close from 48-bar SMA in units of 48-bar close std (trailing).
sma_z_288: Distance of close from 288-bar SMA in units of 288-bar close std (trailing).
body_range: Candle body / range (close-open)/(high-low), 0 when range is 0; in [-1,1].
wick_up_share: Upper wick as a share of bar range; 0 on zero-range bars.
wick_dn_share: Lower wick as a share of bar range; 0 on zero-range bars.
body_z_48: Signed relative candle body (close-open)/close, z-scored over trailing 48 bars.
consec_runs: Signed count of consecutive same-sign 5m closes (capped at 12, scaled to [-1,1]).
vol_z_12: z-score of log(1+volume) over trailing 12 bars.
vol_z_48: z-score of log(1+volume) over trailing 48 bars.
vol_z_288: z-score of log(1+volume) over trailing 288 bars.
trades_z_48: z-score of log(1+trade count) over trailing 48 bars.
trades_z_288: z-score of log(1+trade count) over trailing 288 bars.
ti_raw: Signed taker imbalance 2*taker_base/volume - 1 (spot), in [-1,1]; 0 on empty bars.
ti_z_48: z-score of spot taker imbalance over trailing 48 bars.
ti_persist_12: Mean sign of taker imbalance over last 12 bars (persistence, in [-1,1]).
ats_z_48: Avg trade size log(1+volume/trades) z-scored over trailing 48 bars.
ats_z_288: Avg trade size log(1+volume/trades) z-scored over trailing 288 bars.
large_flow_ema12: EMA(12) of taker imbalance gated to bars with avg-trade-size z>1 (large/institutional flow).
small_flow_ema12: EMA(12) of taker imbalance gated to bars with avg-trade-size z<-1 (retail/small flow).
lf_x_retn6: Interaction: large-trade flow EMA12 * vol-normalized 6-bar return (does big flow confirm the move).
sf_x_retn6: Interaction: small-trade flow EMA12 * vol-normalized 6-bar return (retail chasing proxy).
m1_ti_mean: Mean of 1m taker imbalances inside the 5m bar.
m1_ti_last: Taker imbalance of the last 1m sub-bar (freshest flow).
m1_maxmove_share: Max |1m log move| inside the bar / 5m log range: 1 = move concentrated in one minute.
m1_sign_agree: Within-bar consecutive 1m return sign-agreement count (0-4) scaled to [-1,1]: momentum vs chop.
m1_last_retn: Last 1m log return normalized by 1m-scaled trailing vol (rv_cc_48/sqrt(5)): freshest momentum.
perp_ti_z_48: z-score of perp taker imbalance over trailing 48 bars.
perp_share_z_288: Perp volume share perp/(perp+spot), z-scored over trailing 288 bars (ffill limit 12).
perp_spot_ti_gap: Perp minus spot taker-imbalance EMA(12) gap: derivative-led vs spot-led flow.
doi_1b_z: 1-bar OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
doi_4b_z: 4-bar (20m) OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
doi_12b_z: 12-bar (1h) OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
doi_48b_z: 48-bar (4h) OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
doi_288b_z: 288-bar (24h) OI change as % of trailing 24h mean OI, z-scored over 30d
oi_fuel: OI fuel ratio: (OI - trailing 24h mean OI) / 24h mean OI
oi_fuel_z: OI fuel ratio z-scored over trailing 30d
oi_pctile_30d: OI level percentile rank within trailing 30d window
deleverage_dir: 1h OI-change z times sign of 1h return (deleveraging direction)
oi_flush_flag: 1 if 1h dOI z < -2 while |1h return| below its trailing 30d median (absorption setup)
oi_spike_flat: 1 if 1h dOI z > +2 while price flat (|1h ret| below trailing 30d median)
cascade_signed: liquidation-cascade proxy: 1h range pctile(30d) > 0.95 AND 1h dOI z < -2, signed by 1h return direction
cascade_decel: 1 if cascade proxy fired within last 6 bars and current 1-bar range z is falling (exhaustion)
tt_pos_ls_z: top-trader position long/short ratio, z-scored over trailing 30d
tt_pos_ls_chg4h_z: 4h change in top-trader position L/S ratio, z-scored over 30d
tt_acct_ls_z: top-trader account long/short ratio, z-scored over trailing 30d
tt_acct_ls_chg4h_z: 4h change in top-trader account L/S ratio, z-scored over 30d
global_ls_z: global account long/short ratio, z-scored over trailing 30d
global_ls_chg4h_z: 4h change in global account L/S ratio, z-scored over 30d
taker_ls_z: taker buy/sell volume ratio, z-scored over trailing 30d
taker_ls_chg4h_z: 4h change in taker buy/sell volume ratio, z-scored over 30d
taker_ls_z_ema: EMA(span=48, 4h) of taker L/S volume ratio z-score
ls_divergence: smart-vs-crowd divergence: z(top-trader position L/S) minus z(global account L/S)
funding_last_z: last settled Binance funding rate, z-scored over trailing 90d of settlements (asof <= t)
funding_pctile_90d: last settled funding rate percentile within trailing 90d of settlements
pred_funding_bps: predicted next funding proxy: trailing 8h mean of premium index close, in bps
mins_to_funding: calendar minutes until next funding settlement (00/08/16 UTC), in (0,480]
prefund_extreme: sign(pred_funding_z) when <=60min to funding AND |pred_funding_z|>1.5, else 0
crowding_score: crowding: -z(funding,30d) * z(OI fuel,30d) -- crowded-short fuel positive
prem_bps: premium index close in bps (perp mark premium over index)
prem_z96: premium index close z-scored over trailing 96 bars (8h)
prem_chg12_bps: 12-bar (1h) change in premium index close, in bps
basis_z288: spot-perp basis z-scored over trailing 288 bars (24h)
basis_chg12_z: 12-bar change in spot-perp basis, z-scored over trailing 30d
deribit_fund_spread_bps: Deribit interest_8h (asof) minus last Binance funding rate, in bps
deribit_fund_spread_z: Deribit-Binance funding spread z-scored over trailing 30d
xa_eth_ret1_vn: ETH 1-bar log return / its trailing EWM(288) 1-bar vol*sqrt(1), clipped +-8
xa_eth_ret3_vn: ETH 3-bar log return / its trailing EWM(288) 1-bar vol*sqrt(3), clipped +-8
xa_eth_ret12_vn: ETH 12-bar log return / its trailing EWM(288) 1-bar vol*sqrt(12), clipped +-8
xa_sol_ret1_vn: SOL 1-bar log return / its trailing EWM(288) 1-bar vol*sqrt(1), clipped +-8
xa_sol_ret3_vn: SOL 3-bar log return / its trailing EWM(288) 1-bar vol*sqrt(3), clipped +-8
xa_sol_ret12_vn: SOL 12-bar log return / its trailing EWM(288) 1-bar vol*sqrt(12), clipped +-8
xa_bnb_ret1_vn: BNB 1-bar log return / its trailing EWM(288) 1-bar vol*sqrt(1), clipped +-8
xa_bnb_ret3_vn: BNB 3-bar log return / its trailing EWM(288) 1-bar vol*sqrt(3), clipped +-8
xa_bnb_ret12_vn: BNB 12-bar log return / its trailing EWM(288) 1-bar vol*sqrt(12), clipped +-8
xa_ethbtc_rs_1h_z: ETH-BTC 1h relative log-return, z-scored over trailing 7d (2016 bars)
xa_ethbtc_rs_4h_z: ETH-BTC 4h relative log-return, z-scored over trailing 7d (2016 bars)
xa_solbtc_rs_1h_z: SOL-BTC 1h relative log-return, z-scored over trailing 7d (2016 bars)
xa_solbtc_rs_4h_z: SOL-BTC 4h relative log-return, z-scored over trailing 7d (2016 bars)
xa_btc_eth_corr288: Rolling 288-bar (24h) correlation of BTC and ETH 5m returns
xa_mean_corr288: Mean rolling 288-bar correlation of BTC vs each of the 17 alts (coupling regime)
xa_breadth_15m: Fraction of 17 alts whose 15m return sign matches BTC's 15m return sign
xa_breadth_1h: Fraction of 17 alts whose 1h return sign matches BTC's 1h return sign
xa_breadth_4h: Fraction of 17 alts whose 4h return sign matches BTC's 4h return sign
xa_breadth_1h_beta: Beta-adjusted breadth: mean over alts of clipped vol-normalized 1h return * sign(BTC 1h return), scaled to ~[-1,1]
xa_breadth_div: Breadth divergence: breadth_1h minus its trailing 24h (288-bar) mean
xa_frac_alts_up_4h: Unconditional breadth: fraction of 17 alts with positive 4h return
xa_dispersion_1h: Cross-sectional std of vol-normalized (clipped) 1h alt returns
xa_dispersion_1h_z: Dispersion of vol-normalized 1h alt returns, z-scored over trailing 7d
xa_amp_ratio: log1p(mean |alt 1h ret| / (|BTC 1h ret| + 0.25*BTC 1h vol floor)), EMA(12) -- alt amplification of BTC moves
xa_alt_taker_imb_ema: Quote-vol-share-weighted mean signed taker imbalance (2*taker_quote/quote_vol-1) across 17 alts, EMA(12)
xa_alt_taker_imb_z: Weighted alt taker imbalance EMA, z-scored over trailing 7d
xa_alt_volsurge_z288: log total alt quote_vol, z-scored over trailing 24h (288 bars)
xa_altbtc_vol_ratio_z: log(total alt quote_vol / BTC quote_vol), z-scored over trailing 7d
xa_btc_volshare_z: BTC share of total (BTC+alts) Binance quote volume, z-scored over trailing 7d (dominance-of-flow proxy)
xa_cb_prem_bps: Coinbase-Binance BTC premium in bps ((cb_close-bn_close)/bn_close*1e4); cb close ffilled max 3 bars
xa_cb_prem_z7d: Coinbase premium EMA(3), z-scored over trailing 7d (2016 bars)
xa_cb_prem_chg12: 12-bar (1h) change in Coinbase premium EMA(3), bps
xa_cb_prem_us: Coinbase premium EMA(3) * US-cash-session indicator (14:30-21:00 UTC), else 0
xa_cb_volshare_z: Coinbase USD volume share of (Coinbase+Binance) BTC volume, z-scored over trailing 7d
xa_dvol_pct90d: DVOL level percentile rank over trailing 90d (min 30d); spliced 1h(+1h shift)/5m series
xa_dvol_vel_z: DVOL velocity: 1h (12-bar) change z-scored over trailing 7d (OOD/crash veto input)
xa_vrp: VRP proxy: trailing 12h annualized BTC realized vol (pct points) minus DVOL
xa_altidx_ret1_vn: Quote-vol-weighted alt index 1-bar return / its trailing EWM(288) vol, clipped +-8
xa_altidx_ret12_vn: Quote-vol-weighted alt index 12-bar (1h) return / trailing vol*sqrt(12), clipped +-8
